text:
Market today: The market mood is cautious, driven by concerns over potential Fed rate hikes and a significant jump in AI-related debt. These factors directly impact your tech/chip heavy portfolio, especially given your margin usage.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.02%) and SPAL (-34%) are major concerns due to their leveraged nature, decay, and substantial losses. QQQI (-1.77%) is also approaching its stop level.

Watch: Keep a close eye on Fed commentary for any shifts in rate policy and monitor the AI sector for signs of further instability given the debt concerns.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your high-risk, leveraged positions to protect against further drawdowns.
plays: Trim SOXL, down -35.02%, due to its leveraged decay and significant loss. Consider reducing exposure to this high-risk margin position.
Manage SPAL, down -34%, a new leveraged ETF. Respect its stop at 21.38 to prevent further substantial drawdowns.
QQQI is flagged for TRIM at -1.77% and near its 52 stop. Consider reducing this position to manage overall market exposure.
